title: taraxacum latifolium
intro: Taraxacum latifolium, also known as the broad-leaved dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum latifolium include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the leaves and roots often being used separately for their distinct medicinal properties.
